---
name: Skill request
about: A new skill the workspace should ship
title: "[skill] "
labels: "skill-request, enhancement"
assignees: ''
---

## Proposed slug

Kebab-case verb-noun. Example: `build-carousel-script`, `triage-inbound-dm`, `extract-objections-from-calls`.

## Department

- [ ] Foundations
- [ ] Marketing
- [ ] Acquisition
- [ ] Fulfillment
- [ ] Program
- [ ] Cross-cutting

## What the skill produces

The exact artifact shape. One sentence.

## Why it is not already a skill

Is the need surfacing from real operations, or is this a theoretical gap? Skills ship when operations ask for them — per the roadmap in [`skills/_INDEX.md`](../../skills/_INDEX.md), not to hit a target count.

## Methodology source

If the skill encodes a named framework, cite the framework category and the descriptor of the source surface (e.g. *"info-product operator long-form ghostwriting playbook"*, *"hybrid-full-stack acquisition framework"*). Use anonymized methodology descriptors only — no real operator, agency, or client names.

## Required profiles

Which of the 6 profiles does this skill read from? At what scope (agency, per-client, both)? What completeness thresholds does it need? See [`ENCODING.md`](../../ENCODING.md) and [`spec/CONTEXT-THRESHOLDS.md`](../../spec/CONTEXT-THRESHOLDS.md).

## Recursive scope

- [ ] Agency-only (operates on agency-level profiles)
- [ ] Client-only (operates on per-client subprofiles)
- [ ] Both (declares scope at invocation time)

## Blind-output classification

- [ ] Hard-required (client-bound or program-bound artifact)
- [ ] Optional (internal artifact)

## Cross-references

Skills that would produce this skill's input. Skills that would consume this skill's output.

## Additional context

Anything that would help an authoring agent draft the `SKILL.md`.
